'''radozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oscillogram|oscillogram]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-d-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oscillogram|oscillogram]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| radozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rædezheth|rædezheth]] || [[word:rædezhej|rædezhej]] || [[word:rædezhesh|rædezhesh]] || [[word:rædezhe|rædezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:radodozhoth|radodozhoth]] || [[word:radodozhoj|radodozhoj]] || [[word:radodozhosh|radodozhosh]] || [[word:radodozho|radodozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:radozhoth|radozhoth]] || [[word:radozhoj|radozhoj]] || [[word:radozhosh|radozhosh]] || [[word:radozho|radozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:radofzhoth|radofzhoth]] || [[word:radofzhoj|radofzhoj]] || [[word:radofzhosh|radofzhosh]] || [[word:radofzhof|radofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:radozhotho|radozhotho]] || [[word:radozhojo|radozhojo]] || [[word:radozhosho|radozhosho]] || [[word:radozhoko|radozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:radozhoth|radozhoth]] || [[word:radozhoj|radozhoj]] || [[word:radozhosh|radozhosh]] || [[word:radozho|radozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:radozhothol|radozhothol]] || [[word:radozhojol|radozhojol]] || [[word:radozhoshol|radozhoshol]] || [[word:radozhokol|radozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:radozhothotho|radozhothotho]] || [[word:radozhojojo|radozhojojo]] || [[word:radozhoshosho|radozhoshosho]] || [[word:radozhoko|radozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:radozhothon|radozhothon]] || [[word:radozhojon|radozhojon]] || [[word:radozhoshon|radozhoshon]] || [[word:radozhokon|radozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:radozhothoro|radozhothoro]] || [[word:radozhojoro|radozhojoro]] || [[word:radozhoshoro|radozhoshoro]] || [[word:radozhokoro|radozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
